_description: Equipment Logger — equipment categories, calibration intervals, maintenance schedules, warranty defaults

two_post_lift.note: Annual inspection required; keep log on file

floor_jack.note: Inspect hydraulic seals and rating label

jack_stands.note: Check for cracks, ratchet wear, capacity label

tire_balancer.note: Calibrate with known test wheel; check mounting cone

tire_changer.note: Inspect bead breaker, turntable, and duck head

torque_wrench.note: Recalibrate per ASME B107.300; do not store under tension

oil_drain_system.note: Inspect hoses, valves, and waste tank level

air_compressor.note: Drain tank monthly; inspect belt and safety valve; change oil per OEM

lifecycle_guidelines.note: Replace equipment showing fatigue, cracks, or calibration drift beyond manufacturer tolerance.

depreciation_defaults.note: Consult accountant for tax depreciation schedule (Section 179 may apply).

regulatory_references.lifts: ANSI/ALI ALIS — Automotive Lift Institute Safety Standard
regulatory_references.ac_equipment: EPA Section 608 — technician and equipment certification
regulatory_references.pressure_vessels: ASME Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code (compressor tanks)
regulatory_references.fire_safety: NFPA 30B and local fire marshal requirements
